name: smartsuite-mcp-server
description: Local MCP server for governed access to SmartSuite solutions, applications, records, fields, formulas, views, dashboards, automations, comments, and SmartDocs.

base_url.title: SmartSuite API Base URL
base_url.description: SmartSuite API base URL. Leave as default unless using a private instance.

mode.title: Access Mode
mode.description: readonly: inspect data only. readwrite: create and update records. admin: all operations.

max_records.title: Maximum Records Per Tool Call
max_records.description: Hard cap for list and query tools.

enable_delete.title: Enable Delete Tools
enable_delete.description: Allow record deletion. Destructive — requires confirmation.

enable_restore.title: Enable Restore Tools
enable_restore.description: Allow restoring soft-deleted records and fields from the trash. Requires readwrite or admin access mode.

enable_schema_write.title: Enable Schema Writes
enable_schema_write.description: Allow creating/updating fields, formulas, forms, views, dashboards, widgets, and automations. Requires readwrite or admin access mode.

enable_cross_workspace.title: Enable Cross-Workspace Access
enable_cross_workspace.description: Allow read-only access to other workspaces your API key can reach. Writes always target the primary workspace only.

allowed_workspaces.title: Allowed Workspaces
allowed_workspaces.description: Optional comma-separated workspace slugs or names reachable when cross-workspace access is on. Leave empty to allow all accessible workspaces.
